designSystem.style: Vibrant purple-to-pink gradient identity with glassmorphic cards, cinematic dark storytelling panels, and playful interactive micro-choices. Clean rounded UI with bold typographic hierarchy and soft glow accents.

screens: Discover — Contextual moment detection banner, genre filter pills, and scene cards with progress tracking
Scenes — Personal scene library with stats, branch counts, play tracking, and status badges
Play — Full interactive story player with branching narrative beats and choice-driven outcomes
Social — Remix activity feed with live collab indicator, friend activity, and remix actions
Profile — User profile, light/dark theme toggle, notification & location settings, account options
